item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
Repository for OpenSuSE Tumbleweed
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.6
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.5
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.4
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.4/home:wusel1007.repo

Use:
- sudo zypper addrepo "Path to Repo"
- sudo zypper refresh

[read more]

ClamAV-GUI

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: GODSPEED MODE [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED MODE [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED MODE
(Virtualization)
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GODSPEED [/color][color=#008000]MODE [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1733388/]1.GSM PROFILE manager [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]3.GSGCC [/url]
[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]


[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip filename.zip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./filename32
For 64-bit systems:
/filename64

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash filename32
For 64-bit systems:
bash filename64

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[read more]

(Virtualization)

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

unzip filename.zip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder

Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(Virtualization)
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"
Introducing the Red Magic Game Launcher: The Perfect Addition to Your Mobile Gaming Experience

Are you an avid mobile gamer? Do you wish to have a seamless gaming experience on your Android device? Look no further as Red Magic has got you covered with its game launcher that works on both rooted and non-rooted devices.

Red Magic Game Launcher is an innovative app designed to provide gamers with a seamless and enhanced gaming experience. It optimizes your device's performance to ensure smooth gameplay, and it also offers a wide range of customization options to tailor your gaming experience to your liking.

One of the best things about the Red Magic Game Launcher is that it works on both rooted and non-rooted devices. This means that you can enjoy the benefits of the app whether you have a rooted device or not.

The app offers a variety of features that can enhance your gaming experience. It allows you to customize your gaming settings to suit your preferences and improve your device's performance. You can adjust the resolution, frame rate, and graphics quality to ensure a smooth gaming experience, even on low-end devices.

The Red Magic Game Launcher also offers a gaming toolbox that includes a screen recorder, screenshot feature, and do not disturb mode. The screen recorder allows you to record your gameplay and share it with your friends, while the screenshot feature lets you capture your favorite gaming moments. The do not disturb mode ensures that you are not distracted by notifications while gaming.

The app also provides an in-built game store where you can download and install new games or update your existing games. The game store is continually updated with new games and offers a wide range of genres to cater to all types of gamers.

Red Magic Game Launcher is free to download and use, and it is available on the Google Play Store. The app is compatible with most Android devices, and it provides an excellent gaming experience, whether you are a casual or hardcore gamer.

In conclusion, if you are a mobile gamer looking for a seamless and enhanced gaming experience, the Red Magic Game Launcher is a must-have app. It offers a wide range of features that can improve your device's performance, provide customization options, and enhance your gaming experience. So, why wait? Download the Red Magic Game Launcher today and take your mobile gaming experience to the next level!
[read more]
item.description:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(Virtualization)
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"
Introducing the Red Magic Game Launcher: The Perfect Addition to Your Mobile Gaming Experience

Are you an avid mobile gamer? Do you wish to have a seamless gaming experience on your Android device? Look no further as Red Magic has got you covered with its game launcher that works on both rooted and non-rooted devices.

Red Magic Game Launcher is an innovative app designed to provide gamers with a seamless and enhanced gaming experience. It optimizes your device's performance to ensure smooth gameplay, and it also offers a wide range of customization options to tailor your gaming experience to your liking.

One of the best things about the Red Magic Game Launcher is that it works on both rooted and non-rooted devices. This means that you can enjoy the benefits of the app whether you have a rooted device or not.

The app offers a variety of features that can enhance your gaming experience. It allows you to customize your gaming settings to suit your preferences and improve your device's performance. You can adjust the resolution, frame rate, and graphics quality to ensure a smooth gaming experience, even on low-end devices.

The Red Magic Game Launcher also offers a gaming toolbox that includes a screen recorder, screenshot feature, and do not disturb mode. The screen recorder allows you to record your gameplay and share it with your friends, while the screenshot feature lets you capture your favorite gaming moments. The do not disturb mode ensures that you are not distracted by notifications while gaming.

The app also provides an in-built game store where you can download and install new games or update your existing games. The game store is continually updated with new games and offers a wide range of genres to cater to all types of gamers.

Red Magic Game Launcher is free to download and use, and it is available on the Google Play Store. The app is compatible with most Android devices, and it provides an excellent gaming experience, whether you are a casual or hardcore gamer.

In conclusion, if you are a mobile gamer looking for a seamless and enhanced gaming experience, the Red Magic Game Launcher is a must-have app. It offers a wide range of features that can improve your device's performance, provide customization options, and enhance your gaming experience. So, why wait? Download the Red Magic Game Launcher today and take your mobile gaming experience to the next level!
[read more]

item.title: GAME SPACE [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(Virtualization)
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

1. What games are compatible with Game Space?
Game Space is compatible with a wide range of mobile games, from popular titles to indie gems. Whether you're into action, adventure, strategy, or racing games, you'll find something to love in the Game Space library.

2. How does Game Space enhance gaming performance?
Game Space optimizes your device's resources to ensure smooth and seamless gameplay. It minimizes background processes, allocates more CPU and GPU power to your games, and prioritizes network connectivity, all of which contribute to an enhanced gaming experience.

3. Can I customize Game Space settings to suit my preferences?
Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!
[read more]

item.title: Phoenix Pro Apk [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Phoenix Pro Apk [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
Phoenix Pro Apk
(Virtualization)
Unlocking the Power of Phoenix Pro APK: Revolutionizing Profile Management for Magisk Modules
You must need this flashable zip for run all profiles
[url= https://www.pling.com/p/2049089/] Phoenix Pro flashable zip for run all profiles [/url]

In the dynamic realm of Android customization, Magisk has emerged as a beacon for enthusiasts seeking to elevate their device's capabilities. At the forefront of this movement lies the Phoenix Pro Magisk Module, an indispensable tool that has revolutionized the way users manage their device profiles. Coupled with its intuitive interface and unparalleled functionality, the Phoenix Pro APK stands as a testament to innovation in the Magisk community.

The Rise of Phoenix Pro APK

Since its inception, Phoenix Pro has steadily ascended to the summit of the Magisk module hierarchy, captivating users with its extensive feature set and seamless integration. Developed by a dedicated team of enthusiasts, this module has garnered widespread acclaim for its ability to streamline profile management, providing users with unparalleled control over their device configurations.

Dominating the Magisk Module Community

In the ever-expanding landscape of Magisk modules, Phoenix Pro reigns supreme, boasting an impressive array of functionalities that cater to the diverse needs of users. From advanced profile customization to comprehensive system tweaks, this module encompasses a myriad of features designed to enhance the Android experience.

Unleashing the Power of Profile Management

At the core of Phoenix Pro lies its sophisticated profile management system, which empowers users to create, customize, and deploy profiles with unparalleled ease. Whether fine-tuning performance parameters or optimizing battery life, the module offers a comprehensive suite of tools to cater to every user's preferences.

Seamless Integration and User-Friendly Interface

One of Phoenix Pro's standout features is its seamless integration with Magisk Manager, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of devices and firmware versions. Moreover, its intuitive user interface provides a hassle-free experience, allowing even novice users to harness the full potential of the module with minimal effort.

Future Prospects and Continued Innovation

As the Magisk ecosystem continues to evolve, Phoenix Pro remains at the forefront of innovation, with developers constantly refining and expanding its feature set to meet the ever-changing needs of users. With a dedicated community backing its development, the module is poised to maintain its dominance in the Magisk module landscape for years to come.

Conclusion

In a landscape defined by innovation and customization, Phoenix Pro APK stands as a testament to the ingenuity of the Magisk community. With its unrivaled profile management capabilities, seamless integration, and commitment to continuous improvement, the module has solidified its status as the go-to solution for Android enthusiasts seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices. As we look towards the future, Phoenix Pro remains a shining beacon of excellence in the dynamic world of Magisk modules.

Whether you're a seasoned Android veteran or a newcomer to the world of customization, Phoenix Pro APK offers an unparalleled experience that is sure to elevate your device to new heights. Embrace the power of Phoenix Pro and embark on a journey of limitless possibilities in the realm of Android customization.

[read more]

item.title: ROG CAM [PORT] [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: ROG CAM [PORT] [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
ROG CAM [PORT]
(Virtualization)
The ROG Camera Port APK, ported by revWhiteShadow, is an Android application that brings the powerful camera features of ROG (Republic of Gamers) devices to all Android smartphones and tablets. This ported version allows users to enjoy the advanced photography capabilities found in ROG devices without the need for owning one.
The ROG Camera Port APK offers a range of features designed to enhance your photography experience. It provides access to a variety of shooting modes, including HDR (High Dynamic Range), Pro mode for manual control over settings like ISO and shutter speed, Night mode for capturing low-light scenes, and Panorama mode for capturing wide-angle landscapes.

Additionally, the app offers various filters and editing tools to personalize your photos and add artistic effects. Users can also take advantage of features like Beauty mode for enhancing portraits, Slow Motion for capturing smooth slow-motion videos, and Time Lapse for creating captivating time-lapse footage.

Thanks to the port by revWhiteShadow, the ROG Camera Port APK is compatible with a wide range of Android devices, bringing the premium camera experience to a broader audience. Whether you're an avid mobile photographer or simply looking to elevate your smartphone photography, this ported app offers an opportunity to explore and harness the advanced camera capabilities found in ROG devices.
[read more]

item.title: Card Restore [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Card Restore [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Card Restore
(Terminal Apps)
www.usbrestore.com provides best methodology to restore user missing files and other valuable documents in very short time. Card Restore application has capability to instantly recover lost data from mistakenly formatted memory cards. Memory card restore tool is beneficial to save your all recovered data into specified place without need any special guidance to prior knowledge. Card Restore program uses inbuilt disk scanning mechanism for easily searching and restoring missing/misplace files in few click of mouse button. Memory data card retrieval program successfully recovers deleted files, erased pictures/photos, missing official text documents or corrupted memory storage media in minimum duration of time. Data restore application is fully compatible to work with all types of USB port memory card reader to get back major data loss due accidentally formatted or re-formatted drives. Card recovery software is effectual to easily restore deleted audio-video songs, memorable pictures or computer wallpaper in very short span of time. Memory card data restore tool is safest as well as easiest program on recovering huge amount of data that stored on user device in single time without slow down system performance. Card recovery utility provide reliable mode for all user to restore their missing, misplace or corrupted snapshots/screenshots in very less time. Features:- *Card Restore software is cost effective, reliable and flexible program as compare to other complex tool to easily restore missing files. *Software automatically restores corrupted, damage or crucial data according to the user specified place in very less interval of time. *Memory card restore application undeletes all corrupted files that harm or spoil from the attacks of worm infection or viruses. *Software easily gets back all lost valuable images, photos or video clips from memory storage device within minimum duration of time.

[read more]

[read more]
